cards.title: Hashing
cards.governance_note: Define hash purpose, key space, collisions, equality checks, and security boundaries.

cards.title: Indexing
cards.governance_note: Document index coverage, exclusions, stale states, and query assumptions.

cards.title: Retrieval
cards.governance_note: Explain ranking, freshness, provenance, filters, access controls, and evidence carried with results.

cards.title: Retrieval Risk
cards.governance_note: Audit missing index coverage, stale caches, ambiguous keys, ranking opacity, and provenance loss.
